problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
